payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed vertical panel and a slim vertical silver handle on the right; matte wood-grain finish, occupies most of the crop and is edge-cropped on the right side, estimated about 1.5 m from the camera.
